agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W, F, Y) will enhance complementarity

report.hypothesis: Mutating position 5 to aromatic residues (W, F, Y) will enhance complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/ECL3/TM5/TM6 residues, while mutating position 11 to hydrophobic residues (L, I, V) will reduce off-target SSTR3/SSTR5 binding by avoiding unfavorable electrostatic interactions. This will increase the selectivity margin (Δmargin) by strengthening SSTR2 binding and weakening off-target binding.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs achieve strong ddG but fail to break off-target interactions

report.hypothesis: The current designs achieve strong ddG but fail to break off-target interactions at SSTR3/SSTR5. Targeted mutagenesis at non-pharmacophore positions and stricter structural filtering are needed to push Δmargin above 0.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt conserved pocket contacts with SSTR3/SSTR5 at non-pharmacophore positions and improve selectivity.
Tighter clash filtering may improve structural quality and reduce off-target interactions by enforcing better packing.
